description: After changing the date format in the Settings dialog of a draft document with a CC recipient, the setting is saved successfully without error.
steps: Click the 'Document Settings' button in the left sidebar Quick Actions
Wait for the 'Document Settings' dialog heading to appear
Click the date format dropdown/select element in the Settings dialog
Select a different date format value from the dropdown options
Click the save/update button in the Settings dialog to save the changes
Wait for the save operation to complete and check that no error toast or error message appears
Take screenshot showing the setting was saved successfully
